## Validation

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Rendering Checklist

- [ ] No `setState` inside `useFrame`
- [ ] No geometry, material or texture allocation inside frame loops
- [ ] Effect documentation updated when public behavior changes
- [ ] Performance risk described for shader or draw-call changes
